infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nur uses your microphone to capture voice check-ins for Quranic guidance.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Nur uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice check-ins.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nur uses your location, only while the app is open, to suggest nearby real-world activities alongside verse recommendations. This is entirely optional — check-ins work fully without it.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Nur to access your microphone for voice check-ins.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Nur uses your location, only while the app is open, to suggest nearby real-world activities alongside verse recommendations.
